name: _advprec_softmax_tail
note: Red-team class-1 (softmax/compress) entry for precision_verification.md. kernel.py truncates the far tail (skip elements >8 below max). On benign torch.randn the dropped tail mass is ~0 so error~0 -> a benign-only recheck ACCEPTS it; on a heavy-tailed distribution the dropped mass is real and max error >> tolerance. Demonstrates compression-driven false accept. Yardstick: tests/advprec_softmax_demo.py. Classifier labels it compress -> J1+advdist.

benign.detail: dtype=torch.float32, rtol=0.001, atol=0.001, max_finite_diff=0, nan_mismatch=False, inf_mismatch=False, match=True

adversarial.detail: dtype=torch.float32, rtol=0.001, atol=0.001, max_finite_diff=0.0389147, nan_mismatch=False, inf_mismatch=False, match=False
